ogTitle: Pikedale vs Pile Gully: Climate Safety

heading: Pikedale vs Pile Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pikedale, Queensland and Pile Gully, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pikedale has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Pile Gully (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pikedale or Pile Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pikedale has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Pile Gully scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pikedale scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Pile Gully scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pikedale or Pile Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pikedale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
